description: Use this API to return switched shunt model starting array indices and status. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr, ival = swsmind_2(ibus, id, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the switched shunt model quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Number of CON values used by the model.
Number of STATE values used by the model.
Number of VAR values used by the model.
Number of ICON values used by the model.

Bypassed flag: 0 = bypassed; 1 = not bypassed. Does not reflect switched shunt status. For a model to be called during simulations the switched shunt must be in service the model’s bypassed flag must be not bypassed.

error_codes.description: Switched shunt not in network but in model tables; ‘IVAL’ returned.
Switched shunt not in network or in model tables; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
No model in model tables; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
Model does not use any of this data type; ‘IVAL’ = 0 returned.
Dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
